evidence: Baseline: 48, Final: 48, Growth: 0 in 90s. execution-requests at MAXLEN 5000 and growing but execution-results flat.
expected: execution-results should grow as execution engine processes requests
actual: No new execution results during entire smoke test. EE stats show it processed 48 total (30 before smoke, 18 more during early runtime). Now stalled.
recommendation: Investigate execution engine consumer — it appears to have stopped processing new execution-requests. The EE received 2278 opportunities with 2247 validation errors (98.6% rejection rate). Check validation logic for overly strict filters.

evidence: Stays at MAXLEN ~5000 throughout smoke test. New entries being added but trimmed to MAXLEN.
expected: execution-requests should be consumed, keeping length well below MAXLEN
actual: Stream at capacity (5000). Coordinator forwarding faster than EE consuming. MAXLEN trimming means oldest unprocessed requests are being dropped.
recommendation: Increase execution engine consumer throughput or increase MAXLEN for execution-requests

actual: No DLQ entries — pipeline failures are validation rejections, not DLQ-worthy errors

evidence: TraceId 806807a7ecaa63285ab5f118a66d5fe4 found in execution-results with _trace_traceId, _trace_spanId, _trace_serviceName, _trace_parentSpanId fields. Matching traceId present in execution-requests.
actual: Trace context present and propagating correctly

evidence: All 13 chains active: P1 BSC(1809) Polygon(1069) AVAX(2990) FTM(1007), P2 Arb(5950) OP(2153) Base(6537) Scroll(1245) Blast(398), P3 ETH(3689) zkSync(687) Linea(690), P4 Solana(68670). P4 pairsMonitored=0 expected.
actual: All 13 chains producing data. No silent chains.

evidence: Post-smoke: riskState=NORMAL, tradingAllowed=true, positionSizeMultiplier=1, drawdown=0. Success rate improved from 70% to 79.17% during smoke test.
actual: NORMAL — simulation did not trigger drawdown controls

evidence: execution-requests at 5003/5000 (100% fill ratio). Coordinator health does not report backpressure field. Stream is at MAXLEN cap.
expected: Backpressure should activate when stream at capacity
actual: Backpressure not reported in coordinator health despite stream at 100% capacity. Either not implemented, not connected, or only activates above MAXLEN.
recommendation: Verify backpressure implementation reads XLEN and activates when ratio > 0.8

evidence: P1 delta=+1563, P2 delta=+4423, P3 delta=+956, P4 delta=+17640. All partitions actively processing during smoke test.
actual: All 4 partitions actively processing. P4 highest throughput (Solana block-driven).
